---
title: "Harriet and her Sister."
---

## Harriet and her Sister.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1848
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London, and Joseph Masters, 78, New Bond Street, London

### Notes

There are copies in the NLW and Lambeth Palace Library.  It was reprinted in <i>The Christmas Mummers and Other Stories</i> (1876).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
